Adium 1.3 with Spotify-support

Aug 26, 2008

Yesterday Adium 1.3 was released, which among many things includes a Spotify link recognition patch, making embedded Spotify URI’s[1] clickable.

You can read more in the Spotify Blog.

[1] Introduction to Spotify URI’s
